📋 Weekly Summary ?A quick overview of your social media this week. Read this first to get the big picture!

Here's what you need to know — no data science required
Things are looking great! Our content is connecting with the audience and engagement is healthy across platforms. We had a standout post that performed 18.6x above average!

📊 Key Numbers ?The most important numbers from all your platforms at a glance.

  • 📊 We've published 182 posts in total
  • 👀 Instagram: reached 480,270 people
  • 👀 TikTok: 791,642 video views
  • 💬 We received 197,164 interactions (likes, comments, shares, saves)
  • 👥 We gained 4,989 new followers across all platforms
  • 📈 TikTok reach grew 244% compared to last week

✅ What's Working ?Content and strategies that are performing well right now. Keep doing these!

  • Short Video posts on Instagram get the best engagement (31 posts analyzed)
  • Short Video posts on TikTok get the best engagement (24 posts analyzed)
  • Wednesday is our best performing day
  • Using emojis increases engagement on Instagram
  • Using emojis increases engagement on TikTok
  • Our post "사랑의 대만과 및 오찬 | Agape Vespers & Feast St. Nicholas " went viral on Instagram (18.6x above average)

⚠️ What Needs Attention ?Areas where performance is dropping or could be better. Worth a look.

  • Our audience may be getting tired of Image posts on Instagram (engagement is dropping)
  • We're getting lots of likes but very few comments — try asking questions or creating discussion-worthy content

🎯 This Week's Actions ?Specific, easy steps you can take this week to improve your results.

  1. Create more Short Video content on Instagram — it's your top performer
  2. Schedule your most important post for 10:00 KST
  3. Short Video content is gaining momentum on TikTok — invest more in this format
